childElements.name: UserChanges
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "IsClinicianChanged" : "=%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_Notes:TXA_Comments% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_Notes:TXA_Comments% || %OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:SL_ProfessionalStatus% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:SL_ProfessionalStatus%
|| %OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:SL_ProfessionalTitle% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:SL_ProfessionalTitle%
|| %OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:SL_PracticingPreference% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:SL_PracticingPreference%", "IsPractSpecialtyChanged" : "=%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:TA_PracticingSpecialty% <> %OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:TA_PracticingSpecialty%", "IsPrimarySpecialtyChanged" : "=%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:TA_PrimarySpecialty% <>
%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:TA_PrimarySpecialty%", "IsMedicalLicenseChanged" : "=%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:MUL_MedicalLicenseState% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:MUL_MedicalLicenseState%", "IsTaxonomyChanged" : "=ISBLANK(%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_Taxonomy-Block:PracTaxonomyId%)", "IsBoardCertChanged" : "=%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:RAD_BoardCeritified% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:RAD_BoardCeritified%", "IsPersonEducationChanged" : "=%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:TXT_Program% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:TXT_Program% ||
%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:DT_EndDate% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:DT_EndDate%", "IsVisaChanged" : "=%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_SponsorshipDetail:SEL_VisaType% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_SponsorshipDetail:SEL_VisaType%", "IsPractSpecialtyDeleted" : "=ISBLANK(%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:PracSpecId%) && ISNOTBLANK(%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:PracSpecId%)", "IsPrimarySpecialtyDeleted" : "=ISBLANK(%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:PrimarySpecId%) && ISNOTBLANK(%OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:PrimarySpecId%)", "IsTaxonomyDeleted" : "=ISBLANK(%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ClinicianInformation:TA_Taxonomy-Block:PracTaxonomyId%)", "VisaNotRequired" : "=%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_SponsorshipDetail:RAD_SponsorshipNeed% == "No" || %OriginalClinicianInformation:BLK_SponsorshipDetail:SEL_VisaType% <> %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_SponsorshipDetail:SEL_VisaType%", "IsPersonEducationDeleted" : "=%STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:SL_ProfessionalStatus% <> "Resident" && %STP_ClinicianInfo:BLK_ProfessionalStatus:SL_ProfessionalStatus% <> "Student"" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
